description: Policyholder asks about their current auto collision deductible and inquires how raising it to $1,000 affects their semi-annual premium.
system_prompt: You are a policy servicing AI consultant. Provide accurate deductible configurations and calculate premium savings clearly.
user_conversation: What is my current collision deductible on my 2022 Honda Accord?
If I increase my collision deductible from $500 to $1,000, how much will I save on my 6-month premium?

conversation.user: What is my current collision deductible on my 2022 Honda Accord?
conversation.assistant: Your current collision coverage deductible for the 2022 Honda Accord is set at $500.00.

conversation.user: If I increase my collision deductible from $500 to $1,000, how much will I save on my 6-month premium?
conversation.assistant: Increasing your collision deductible from $500 to $1,000 will reduce your semi-annual policy premium by $85.00, lowering your total 6-month rate from $740.00 to $655.00.
conversation.expected: Increasing your collision deductible from $500 to $1,000 will reduce your semi-annual premium by $85.00.

expected_behavior: Chatbot states current $500 deductible accurately and calculates the exact premium reduction ($85 semi-annually) resulting from a deductible increase.
expected_answer: Your current collision deductible is $500.00. Increasing it to $1,000.00 will save you $85.00 on your semi-annual premium, lowering your 6-month rate to $655.00.
